form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at Lyon-Parilly October 30 over 2400m, on rain affected going; 9 len behind A Beauregard with 60kg at $18. Previously first up; second last of 7 at Fontainebleau April 12 over 2600m, 3.5 len behind Annabel's Ghost with 56kg at $17. Doubt he will have much to offer first up.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run came from midfield and won by 2 len at Compiegne March 27 over 2400m on a soft track defeating Moro with 56.5kg at $4.30. The race before that won by 2 len at Saint-Cloud March 15 over 2400m in the wet defeating Martial Art carrying 55kg at $7.80. Well placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 58-day let-up. At the latest run raced on the pace before fading ran last of 10 at Marseille Vivaux on February 10 over 2600m, 13 len behind Coupe D'europe with 59.5kg at $7.70. The race before that second last of 12 at Deauville All Weather on January 23 over 2500m, 46 len behind Vadirum with 55kg at $15. Not a good sign last start so others preferred.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after eight months 12th of 16 at Strasbourg on March 22 over 2350m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Candyman carrying 58.5kg at $34. Previously second-up 8th of 13 at Vichy on August 14 2024 over 2000m, 3 len behind Wild Sweetheart with 61.5kg at $24. Watch for significant improvement.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months second last of 13 at Lyon-Parilly on March 29 over 2200m, on a slow track; 29 len behind Centrical with 56.5kg at $17. Previously second-up 3rd in a small field at Deauville All Weather on August 21 over 1900m, 2.5 len behind Le Sid carrying 56kg at $9.10. Can't entertain until he shows something more.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 50-day let-up. Last start led to the turn then faded 5th of 13 at Pornichet on February 18 over 3100m, 6 len behind Huchenane with 55kg at $6.50. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; scored a big 3.5 len win at Pornichet January 7 over 3100m defeating Watt Ohm carrying 60kg at $9.70. Major player on best form.
